mapper.select: SELECT id, vocabulary_entry_id, correct_option, selected_option FROM quiz_attempts WHERE id = #{attemptId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, prompt_type, prompt_text, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d FROM quiz_attempts WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND selected_option IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
